host.description: Hostname for external access via Ingress. Leave empty to skip Ingress.

storageClass.description: StorageClass for the managed Postgres PVCs. Leave empty to use cluster default.

name.description: Database name Open WebUI stores users, conversations, and configuration in.

password.description: Optional explicit password. When empty, the cozystack postgres chart generates and preserves one via lookup.

size.description: Persistent Volume size for database storage.

user.description: Database user Open WebUI connects as.

enabled.description: Provision a sibling Qdrant CR and point Open WebUI at it via VECTOR_DB + QDRANT_URI.

size.description: Persistent Volume size for Qdrant storage.

openaiBaseApiUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. Point this at a litellm gateway (e.g. http://litellm-<name>.<namespace>.svc.cluster.local:4000/v1) to expose every model behind that gateway as a chat option in Open WebUI. Empty falls back to the public OpenAI API.

openaiApiKey.description: Bearer token for the API endpoint above. For LiteLLM, this is the master key. Stored as a Kubernetes Secret.

resources.description: CPU and memory for the Open WebUI container (each value sets both request and limit). Leave a field empty for the upstream chart default.

replicaCount.description: Number of Open WebUI pods. Usually 1.
